name: Laurens School District 56
message: Laurens School District 56 is a school district in South Carolina (Laurens County) which has about 2,800 students. Laurens County School District 56 corporate office is located in 211 N Broad St, Clinton, South Carolina, 29325, United States and has 118 employees. The total amount of data leakage is 2.40 TB
